testsuite.name: ecomerce.E2ETests
testsuite.system-out: === Driver Initialization === Running in CI: false Setting up ChromeDriver via WebDriverManager Creating ChromeDriver instance... ChromeDriver created successfully! 15:19:02.410 [Test worker] INFO core.TestListener - ---------- Test Started: E2ETransactionSuccess ---------- 15:19:02.424 [Test worker] INFO saucedemo.login.LoginTest - User start to do transaction 15:19:02.436 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - LoginPage initialized 15:19:02.465 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Checkout - Checkout page initialized 15:19:02.465 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Attempting to login with username: rizkidmhm+1@gmail.com 15:19:05.085 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Email entered 15:19:05.141 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Password entered 15:19:07.229 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Login button clicked 15:19:07.230 [Test worker] INFO saucedemo.login.LoginTest - User search product 15:19:07.230 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Checkout - Searching for book: Agile Testing 15:19:09.084 [Test worker] INFO saucedemo.login.LoginTest - User add product to cart 15:19:09.084 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Checkout - Proceeding to checkout 15:19:17.457 [Test worker] INFO saucedemo.login.LoginTest - Verifying user can see the Transaction Success Message after checkout 15:19:17.458 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Checkout - Checking if user order in successfully 15:19:20.402 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Checkout - Expected text: 'Your purchase was successful! Thank you for your order.' | Actual text: 'Your purchase was successful! Thank you for your order. Reference ID: 69c8e087dea7ed02979affbe' 15:19:20.413 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Checkout - User is success order - Success message is displayed 15:19:20.415 [Test worker] INFO core.TestListener - Test PASSED: E2ETransactionSuccess (Duration: 18007ms) === Driver Initialization === Running in CI: false Setting up ChromeDriver via WebDriverManager Creating ChromeDriver instance... ChromeDriver created successfully! 15:19:24.990 [Test worker] INFO core.TestListener - ---------- Test Started: loginUsers ---------- 15:19:24.991 [Test worker] INFO saucedemo.login.LoginTest - User Login to The Websites 15:19:24.991 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - LoginPage initialized 15:19:24.991 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Attempting to login with username: rizkidmhm+1@gmail.com 15:19:30.366 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Email entered 15:19:30.416 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Password entered 15:19:30.463 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Login button clicked 15:19:30.463 [Test worker] INFO saucedemo.login.LoginTest - Verifying user can see the Welcome Message after login 15:19:30.463 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Checking if user is logged in successfully 15:19:33.763 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - Expected text: 'Hello rizki' | Actual text: 'Hello rizki' 15:19:33.776 [Test worker] INFO org.example.eccomerce.Login - User is logged in successfully - Welcome message is displayed 15:19:33.776 [Test worker] INFO saucedemo.login.LoginTest - PASSED: User can see the Welcome Message page 15:19:33.776 [Test worker] INFO saucedemo.login.LoginTest - === Test Login Successfully Completed === 15:19:33.776 [Test worker] INFO core.TestListener - Test PASSED: loginUsers (Duration: 8786ms)
testsuite.system-err: Mar 29, 2026 3:18:58 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 29, 2026 3:18:58 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.165. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.35.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. Mar 29, 2026 3:19:21 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 29, 2026 3:19:21 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.165. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.35.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
